---
title: "{PLATFORM_TITLE}"
subtitle: "Platform Evaluation Report"
ugc_answers_file: "data/2025/global/{PLATFORM_NAME}/ugc.yml"
ads_answers_file: "data/2025/global/{PLATFORM_NAME}/ads.yml"
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))

from utils.quarto_helpers import load_platform_results

results_ugc, results_ads = load_platform_results(
    ugc_file="data/2025/global/{PLATFORM_NAME}/ugc.yml",
    ads_file="data/2025/global/{PLATFORM_NAME}/ads.yml",
    year='2025'
)

```

**User-generated transparency score:** `{python} f"{results_ugc['total_score']:.0f}"` / `{python} f"{results_ugc['total_max']:.0f}"` (`{python} f"{results_ugc['total_percentage']:.0f}"`%)

**Advertising transparency score:** `{python} f"{results_ads['total_score']:.0f}"` / `{python} f"{results_ads['total_max']:.0f}"` (`{python} f"{results_ads['total_percentage']:.0f}"`%)


## Executive Summary

Describe how the platform’s architecture or business model influences the evaluation scope. Example elements: centralized/decentralized design, presence/absence of advertising model. Specify which transparency dimensions are relevant or excluded based on platform characteristics (e.g., UGC data access, advertising transparency, algorithmic transparency). Highlight transparency Strengths and Limitations. Concise overview of the platform’s overall transparency posture. Highlight how strengths and limitations impact potential research, auditing, or governance applications.

## User-Generated Content 

```{python}
#| label: ugc-summary-table
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from utils.quarto_helpers import generate_summary_table
generate_summary_table(results_ugc)
```

## Advertising 

```{python}
#| label: ads-summary-table
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

generate_summary_table(results_ads)
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
